message:
fix(http/pool): use try_from instead of truncating as-cast for cleanup interval

maybe_cleanup() compared elapsed nanos (u64) against cleanup_interval
.as_nanos() (u128) via a silent as-u64 truncation. Use try_from with
unwrap_or(u64::MAX) to match the pattern already used in is_expired().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
